SELECT
    CDSCode,
    `Enrollment (K-12)` AS enrollment,
    `Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS free_meal_count,
    `Free Meal Count (K-12)` / `Enrollment (K-12)` AS eligible_free_rate
FROM (
    SELECT
        CDSCode,
        `Enrollment (K-12)`,
        `Free Meal Count (K-12)`,

) AS ranked

84:
SELECT an.FirstName, an.District
FROM (
    SELECT AdmFName1 AS FirstName, District FROM schools
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools
) AS an
JOIN (
    SELECT FirstName
    FROM (
        SELECT AdmFName1 AS FirstName FROM schools
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName2 FROM schools
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName3 FROM schools
    )
    GROUP BY FirstName
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 2
) AS top_names
ON an.FirstName = top_names.FirstName
ORDER BY top_names.FirstName, an.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

94:
WITH oldest_date AS (
  SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS d
  FROM client
  WHERE gender = 'F'
),
lowest_avg_salary AS (
  SELECT MIN(district.A11) AS val
  FROM client
  JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
  WHERE client.gender = 'F'
),
filtered_accounts AS (
  SELECT a.account_id
  FROM client c
  JOIN disp d1 ON c.client_id = d1.client_id
  JOIN account a ON d1.account_id = a.account_id
  JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
  WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    AND c.birth_date = (SELECT d FROM oldest_date)
    AND d.A11 = (SELECT val FROM lowest_avg_salary)
),
salary_stats AS (
  SELECT MAX(district.A11) AS max_avg, MIN(district.A11) AS min_avg
  FROM client
  JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
  WHERE client.gender = 'F'
)
SELECT account_id, (max_avg - min_avg) AS gap
FROM filtered_accounts
CROSS JOIN salary_stats;	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT
    CAST(max_bond_count.max_cnt AS REAL) * 100.0 / total_bonds.total AS percentage
FROM
    (SELECT e1, e2, cnt
     FROM (
         SELECT e1, e2, COUNT(*) AS cnt
         FROM (
             SELECT bond_id,
                    CASE WHEN elem1 <= elem2 THEN elem1 ELSE elem2 END AS e1,
                    CASE WHEN elem1 <= elem2 THEN elem2 ELSE elem1 END AS e2
             FROM (
                 SELECT b.bond_id,
                        a1.element AS elem1,
                        a2.element AS elem2
                 FROM bond b
                 JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
                 JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
                 JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
             )
         )
         GROUP BY e1, e2
     )
     ORDER BY cnt DESC
     LIMIT 1) AS max_bond_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM bond) AS total_bonds;	----- bird -----	toxicology

    WHEN 'c'  THEN 'Carbon'
    WHEN 'h'  THEN 'Hydrogen'
    WHEN 'o'  THEN 'Oxygen'
    WHEN 's'  THEN 'Sulfur'
    WHEN 'n'  THEN 'Nitrogen'
    WHEN 'p'  THEN 'Phosphorus'
    WHEN 'na' THEN 'Sodium'
    WHEN 'br' THEN 'Bromine'
    WHEN 'f'  THEN 'Fluorine'
    WHEN 'i'  THEN 'Iodine'
    WHEN 'sn' THEN 'Tin'

944:
SELECT ROUND(
  ((CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,7,2) AS INTEGER))*1000 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,10,3) AS INTEGER) -
   (CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time,7,2) AS INTEGER))*1000 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time,10,3) AS INTEGER))
  * 100.0 /
  ((CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,7,2) AS INTEGER))*1000 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time,10,3) AS INTEGER))
, 2) AS percent_faster
FROM
  (SELECT time FROM results
   WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name LIKE 'Australian%' AND year = 2008)
     AND position = 1) AS champ,
  (SELECT time FROM results
   WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name LIKE 'Australian%' AND year = 2008)
     AND time IS NOT NULL
   ORDER BY position DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_driver;	----- bird -----	formula_1

       ) AS avg_seconds

1128:
SELECT c.name
FROM Country c
JOIN (
    SELECT m.country_id, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight
    FROM (
        SELECT home_player_X1 AS player_api_id, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X2, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X3, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X4, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X5, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X6, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X7, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X8, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X9, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X10, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT home_player_X11, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X1, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X2, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X3, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X4, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X5, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X6, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X7, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X8, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X9, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X10, country_id FROM Match
        UNION ALL SELECT away_player_X11, country_id FROM Match
    ) AS m
    JOIN Player p ON p.player_api_id = m.player_api_id
    WHERE m.player_api_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY m.country_id
) AS sub ON c.id = sub.country_id
ORDER BY sub.avg_weight DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	european_football_2

1453:
SELECT pe.event_name
FROM (
    SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_parking
    FROM event e
    JOIN budget b ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
    JOIN expense exp ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
    WHERE b.category = 'Parking'
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
) AS pe
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT SUM(total_parking) / COUNT(*) AS avg_parking
    FROM (
        SELECT e.event_id, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_parking
        FROM event e
        JOIN budget b ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
        JOIN expense exp ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
        WHERE b.category = 'Parking'
        GROUP BY e.event_id
    )
) AS ap
WHERE pe.total_parking < ap.avg_parking;	----- bird -----	student_club

1482:
SELECT
    sc.Segment,
    sc.percent_increase,
    CASE
        WHEN sc.percent_increase = (SELECT MAX(percent_increase) FROM seg_change) THEN 'biggest'
        WHEN sc.percent_increase = (SELECT MIN(percent_increase) FROM seg_change) THEN 'lowest'
    END AS type
FROM
    (SELECT
        s.Segment,
        ((COALESCE(t2013.total,0) - COALESCE(t2012.total,0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(t2013.total,0),0)) * 100.0 AS percent_increase
     FROM
        (SELECT c.Segment, substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
         FROM yearmonth y
         JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
         WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
           AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
         GROUP BY c.Segment, yr) t2013
     JOIN
        (SELECT c.Segment, substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
         FROM yearmonth y
         JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
         WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
           AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
         GROUP BY c.Segment, yr) t2012
       ON t2013.Segment = t2012.Segment
     WHERE t2013.yr = '2013' AND t2012.yr = '2012') sc
ORDER BY sc.percent_increase DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1532:
SELECT g.Country
FROM gasstations g
JOIN transactions_1k t ON g.GasStationID = t.GasStationID
WHERE t.ProductID = 2
  AND t.Price = (SELECT MAX(Price) FROM transactions_1k WHERE ProductID = 2)
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1533:
SELECT ym.CustomerID, ym.Consumption
FROM yearmonth AS ym
WHERE ym.Date = '201208'
  AND ym.CustomerID IN (
    SELECT t.CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k AS t
    WHERE t.ProductID = 5
      AND t.Price / t.Amount > 29.00
  );	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
